label: LABEL
definition: A http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115

label: obsolete accessory nerve disorder AE
definition: cranial neuropathy AE that has  involvement of the accessory nerve (eleventh cranial nerve).

label: obsolete acquired immunodeficiency syndrome AE
definition: a immune system disorder AE that is caused by the HIV virus

label: obsolete adrenal neoplasm AE
definition: This is an AE which is a type of abnormal and excessive growth of adrenal  tissue.

label: obsolete adrenal suppression AE
definition: This is an AE which is a condition in which the adrenal glands do not produce adequate amounts of steroid hormones, primarily cortisol; but may also include impaired production of aldosterone (a mineralocorticoid), which regulates sodium conservation, potassium secretion, and water retention.

label: obsolete agranulocytosis AE
definition: This is an AE which is an acute condition involving a severe and dangerous lowered white blood cell count (leukopenia, most commonly of neutrophils) and thus causing a neutropenia in the circulating blood.

label: obsolete alkalosis AE
definition: This is an AE which is the result of a process reducing hydrogen ion concentration of arterial blood plasma (alkalemia).

label: obsolete anemia AE
definition: This is an AE which is a decrease in the total amount of red blood cells (RBCs) or hemoglobin in the blood or a lowered ability of the blood to carry oxygen.

label: obsolete aphasia AE
definition: This is an AE which is an inability to comprehend or formulate language because of damage to specific brain regions.

label: obsolete autism AE
definition: a behavior and neurological AE that has an outcome of autism
editor note: Autism is a brain development disorder characterized by impaired social interaction and communication, and by restricted and repetitive behavior.

label: obsolete behcet's syndrome AE
definition: an ulcer AE that is characterized by ulcers in the mouth that may decrease ocular functionality

label: obsolete blood pressure fluctuation AE
definition: an abnormal blood pressure AE that has an outcome of blood pressure fluctuations

label: obsolete bone marrow edema AE
definition: bone marrow edema AE is an edema AE that occurs when excess fluids in the bone marrow buildup and cause swelling. This condition is often caused by a protective reaction of the body in response to an injury or inflammation

label: obsolete brain edema AE
definition: This is an AE which is excess accumulation of fluid (edema) in the intracellular or extracellular spaces of the brain.

label: obsolete bronchitis AE
definition: This is an AE which is inflammation of the bronchi (large and medium-sized airways) in the lungs that causes coughing.

label: obsolete cardio-respiratory distress AE
definition: This is an AE which is a type of respiratory failure characterized.

label: obsolete cardiogenic shock AE
definition: This is an AE which is a medical emergency resulting from inadequate blood flow due to the dysfunction of the ventricles of the heart.

label: obsolete cellulitis AE
definition: This is an AE which is a bacterial infection involving the inner layers of the skin.

label: obsolete cerebral hemorrhage AE
definition: This is an AE which is a sudden bleeding into the tissues of the brain, into its ventricles, or into both.

label: obsolete cerebral venous sinus thrombosis AE
definition: This is an AE which is the presence of a blood clot in the dural venous sinuses (which drain blood from the brain), the cerebral veins, or both.

label: obsolete cerebrovascular accident AE
definition: This is an AE which is a medical condition in which poor blood flow to the brain causes cell death.

label: obsolete cheilitis AE
definition: This is an AE which is a medical condition characterized by inflammation of the lips.

label: obsolete coagulopathy AE
definition: A coagulopathy AE is a blood disorder AE that has an outcome of coagulopathy, which is a condition in which there is a deviation from or interruption of the normal coagulation properties of the blood.

label: obsolete collapse of lung AE
definition: This is an AE which is an accumulation of air in the chest causing the lung to separate from the chest wall.

label: obsolete color blindness AE
definition: This is an AE which is the decreased ability to see color or differences in color.

label: obsolete costovertebral angle tenderness AE
definition: This is an AE which is pain that results from touching the region inside of the costovertebral angle.

label: obsolete difficulty in walking AE
definition: This is an AE which is a deviation from normal walking (gait).

label: obsolete dislocation of vertebra AE
definition: This is an AE which is a dislocation of an irregular bone with a complex structure composed of bone and some hyaline cartilage, the proportions of which vary according to the segment of the backbone and the species of vertebrate.

label: obsolete disseminated bacillus calmette-guerin infection AE
Chinese translation: 播散性卡介苗杆菌感染
definition: This is an AE which is a mainstay of adjunctive therapy for superficial bladder cancer that increases length of disease progression-free survival and it usually well tolerated, moderate to severe local and systemic infectious complications can occur with this immunotherapy.

label: obsolete disseminated BCG infection AE
definition: a viral infection AE that is caused by a disseminated Bacillus Calmette-Guerin bacterial infection.

label: obsolete dysstasia AE
definition: a behavior and neurological AE that results in dysstasia, or difficulty standing

label: obsolete dysstasia AE
definition: This is an AE which is any of various types of abnormal growth or development of cells (microscopic scale) or organs (macroscopic scale), and the abnormal histology or anatomical structure resulting from such growth.

label: obsolete encephalitis infection AE
definition: This is an AE which is inflammation and infection of the brain.

label: obsolete endometritis AE
definition: This is an AE which is inflammation of the inner lining of the uterus (endometrium).

label: obsolete endophthalmitis AE
definition: This is an AE which is inflammation of the interior cavity of the eye, usually caused by infection.

label: obsolete enterocolitis infectious AE
definition: an infection AE that has an infectious process involving the small and large intestines.

label: obsolete enuresis AE
definition: This is an AE which is a repeated inability to control urination.

label: obsolete epistaxis AE
definition: This is an AE which is bleeding from the nose.

label: obsolete esophageal hemorrhage AE
definition: This is an AE which is an organ in vertebrates through which food passes, aided by peristaltic contractions, from the pharynx to the stomach and the organ is haemorrhage.

label: obsolete esophageal stenosis AE
definition: This is an AE which is a predictor of poor prognosis in patients with oesophageal cancer.

label: obsolete esophageal ulcer AE
definition: This is an AE which occur mainly as a result of gastro-oesophageal reflux disease (GERD).

label: obsolete excoriation AE
definition: This is an AE which refers a punctate or linear abrasion produced by mechanical means (often scratching), usually involving only the epidermis, but commonly reaching the papillary dermis.

label: obsolete exfoliative rash AE
definition: This is an AE which is a change of the human skin which affects its color, appearance, or texture and is exfoliative.

label: obsolete exomphalos AE
definition: This is an AE which is a rare abdominal wall defect.

label: obsolete extradural abscess AE
definition: This is an AE whcih is an uncommon disease with a relatively high rate of associated morbidity and mortality.

label: obsolete extraocular muscle paresis AE
definition: This is an AE which  refers to weakness (-paresis) or paralysis (-plegia) of one or more extraocular muscles which are responsible for eye movements.

label: obsolete extrapyramidal disorder AE
definition: This is an AE which refers to any clinical syndrome with either an excess of movement or a paucity of voluntary and involuntary movements, unrelated to weakness or spasticity.

label: obsolete extravasation AE
definition: This is an AE which is the leakage of a fluid out of its container into the surrounding area, especially blood or blood cells from vessels.

label: obsolete exudative retinopathy AE
definition: This is an AE which may be a manifestation of a variety of isolated ocular or systemic diseases in children.

label: obsolete eye inflammation AE
definition: an inflammation AE that occurs in eye.

label: obsolete face edema AE
definition: This is an AE which is the build-up of fluid in the face tissue.

label: obsolete feeling of body temperature change AE
obsolete fibromyalgia AE
definition: This is an AE which is a medical condition characterized by chronic widespread pain and a heightened pain response to pressure.

label: obsolete fibrosis tendinous AE
definition: This is an AE which is a pathological wound healing in which connective tissue replaces normal tendinous parenchymal tissue to the extent that it goes unchecked, leading to considerable tissue remodelling and the formation of permanent scar tissue.

label: obsolete flatulence AE
definition: This is an AE which is defined in the medical literature as "flatus expelled through the anus" or the "quality or state of being flatulent", which is defined in turn as "marked by or affected with gases generated in the intestine or stomach; likely to cause digestive flatulence".

label: obsolete folliculitis AE
definition: This is an AE which is the infection and inflammation of one or more hair follicles.

label: obsolete forearm fracture AE
definition: This is an AE which is the region of the upper limb between the elbow and the wrist which is fracture.

label: obsolete glossitis AE
definition: a tongue disorder with the outcome of glossitis, a condition in which the tongue is swollen and changes color, which may make the tongue appear smooth

label: obsolete Grade 2 hematoma AE
definition: a hematoma AE that is generalized

label: obsolete Grade 3 intestinal stoma leak AE
definition: an intestinal stoma leak AE that has severe symptoms; IV fluids, tube feeding, or TPN indicated greater than or equal to 24 hrs; elective operative intervention indicated

label: obsolete Grade 3 pancreatitis AE
definition: a pancreatitis AE that has severe pain; vomiting; medical intervention indicated (e.g., analgesia, nutritional support)

label: obsolete Grade 3 postoperative thoracic procedure complication AE
definition: a postoperative thoracic procedure complication AE that has  life-threatening airway compromise; urgent intervention indicated (e.g., tracheotomy or intubation)

label: obsolete hemoglobinuria AE
definition: This is an AE which is a condition in which the oxygen transport protein hemoglobin is found in abnormally high concentrations in the urine.

label: obsolete hemoptysis AE
definition: This is an AE which is the coughing up of blood or blood-stained mucus from the bronchi, larynx, trachea, or lungs.

label: obsolete hemorrhage intracranial AE
definition: This is an AE which is bleeding within the skull.

label: obsolete hepatic hemorrhage AE
definition: This is an AE which is a condition of unrecognized origin which can become extremely serious and whose diagnosis is often made during perinatal autopsy and is often characterised by nonspecific clinical manifestations and a long delay before biological presentation.

label: obsolete hepatic infection AE
definition: This is an AE which is the invasion of an organism's body tissues by disease-causing agents, their multiplication, and the reaction of host tissues to the infectious agents and the toxins they produce such as hepatic infection.

label: obsolete hypoesthesia facial AE
definition: This is an AE which is a common side effect of various medical conditions which manifests as a reduced sense of touch or sensation, or a partial loss of sensitivity to sensory stimuli such as hypoaesthesia facial.

label: obsolete hypoesthesia oral AE
definition: This is an AE which is a common side effect of various medical conditions which manifests as a reduced sense of oral touch or sensation, or a partial loss of sensitivity to sensory stimuli.

label: obsolete idiopathic thrombocytopenic purpura AE
definition: a cardiovascular disorder AE that results in easy or excessive bruising and bleeding. The bleeding results from unusually low levels of platelets.

label: obsolete induration AE
definition: This is an AE which is dermal thickening causing the cutaneous surface to feel thicker and firmer.

label: obsolete intestinal stoma leak AE
definition: a medical intervention site AE that has the finding of leakage of contents from an intestinal stoma (surgically created opening on the surface of the body).

label: obsolete large for dates baby AE
definition: a congetical abnormality AE that results in the patient's baby being larger than it should be at the time in their pregnancy

label: obsolete laryngeal edema AE
definition: This is an AE which may be a cause of ABD in preterm newborns and it may arise from oesophageal reflux and/or presence of the feeding tube. It can be diagnosed by atraumatic fiberoptic fibroscopy and successfully treated with corticosteroids.

label: obsolete leukocytoclastic vasculitis AE
definition: This is an AE which is inflammation of small blood vessels (usually post-capillary venules in the dermis), characterized by palpable purpura and it is the most common vasculitis seen in clinical practice.

label: obsolete libido disorder AE
definition: This is an AE which is a person's overall sexual drive or desire for sexual activity that is became disorder.

label: obsolete lower gastrointestinal hemorrhage AE
definition: a gastrointestinal hemorrhage AE that has an outcome of bleeding in the lower gastrointestinal tract

label: obsolete lung consolidation AE
definition: This is an AE which is a region of normally compressible lung tissue that has filled with liquid instead of air.

label: obsolete menometrorrhagia AE
definition: Hematuria AE that results in excessive uterine bleeding occurs irregularly and more frequently than normal

label: obsolete menorrhagia AE
definition: a menstrual disorder AE that shows a menstrual period with abnormally heavy flow and falls under the larger category of abnormal uterine bleeding (AUB)

label: obsolete myofascitis AE
definition: This is an AE which main cause of the disease is aseptic inflammation of local muscles and connective tissues such as myofascial, which can be manifested as paralysis, distension, and other discomfort, local muscle stiffness, spasm or palpable strain-like nodules.

label: obsolete myopathy AE
definition: This is an AE which is a disease of the muscle  in which the muscle fibers do not function properly.

label: obsolete nephritis AE
definition: This is an AE which is inflammation of the kidneys and may involve the glomeruli, tubules, or interstitial tissue surrounding the glomeruli and tubules.

label: obsolete neurotoxicity AE
definition: This is an AE which is a form of toxicity in which a biological, chemical, or physical agent produces an adverse effect on the structure or function of the central and/or peripheral nervous system.

label: obsolete normochromic normocytic anemia AE
Chinese translation: 正色素性正细胞性贫血
definition: This is an AE which is a common complication in chronic kidney disease and is associated with many adverse clinical consequences.

label: obsolete nystagmus AE
definition: This is an AE which is a condition of involuntary (or voluntary, in some cases) eye movement.

label: obsolete oligohydramnios AE
definition: a reproductive system AE that has an outcome of insufficient placenta, the baby may get less oxygen and nutrients

label: obsolete oliguria AE
definition: This is an AE which is the low output of urine specifically more than 80 ml/day but less than 100ml/day.

label: obsolete ophthalmic artery thrombosis AE
definition: This is an AE which is the formation of a blood clot inside a ophthalmic artery  blood vessel, obstructing the flow of blood through the circulatory system.

label: obsolete orbital edema AE
definition: This is an AE which is the build-up of fluid in the orbital  tissue.

label: obsolete osteonecrosis of jaw AE
definition: a necrosis AE that has a necrotic process occurring in the bone of the mandible.

label: obsolete parotitis AE
definition: A parotid gladn enlargement AE that has an outcome of parotitis, the inflammation of one or more of the parotid glands.

label: obsolete pathological fracture AE
definition: This is an AE which is a bone fracture caused by weakness of the bone structure that leads to decrease mechanical resistance to normal mechanical loads.

label: obsolete periorbital edema AE
definition: This is an AE which is the build-up of fluid in the periorbital tissue.

label: obsolete peripheral artery thrombosis AE
definition: This is an AE which occurs when a blood clot forms in the artery that provides blood flow to the peripheral.

label: obsolete pharyngeal edema AE
definition: This is an AE which is the build-up of fluid in the pharyngeal tissue.

label: obsolete pneumomediastinum AE
definition: This is an AE which is pneumatosis (abnormal presence of air or other gas) in the mediastinum.

label: obsolete pulmonary artery thrombosis AE
definition: This is an AE which is the formation of a pulmonary artery blood clot inside a blood vessel, obstructing the flow of blood through the circulatory system.

label: obsolete reflux esophagitis AE
definition: a digestive system AE located in the esophagus, can present with heartburn, and nausea, caused by gastroesophageal reflux disease

label: obsolete regurgitation AE
definition: This is an AE which is the expulsion of material from the pharynx, or esophagus, usually characterized by the presence of undigested food or blood.

label: obsolete renal tubular necrosis AE
definition: This is an AE which is a medical condition involving the death of tubular epithelial cells that form the renal tubules of the kidneys.

label: obsolete retinal artery thrombosis AE
definition: This is an AE which is the formation of a blood clot inside a retinal artery vessel, obstructing the flow of blood through the circulatory system.

label: obsolete stevens-johnson syndrome AE
Chinese translation: 史蒂文斯-约翰逊综合征
definition: This is an AE which is a type of severe skin reaction.

label: obsolete suture related complication AE
definition: This is an AE which is an suture related unfavorable result of a disease.

label: obsolete tongue edema AE
definition: This is an AE which is the build-up of fluid in the tongue tissue.

label: obsolete vagus nerve disorder AE
definition: a cranial neuropathy AE that has  involvement of the vagus nerve (tenth cranial nerve).

label: obsolete ventricular arrhythmia AE
definition: This is an AE which is a type of arrhythmia.

label: obsolete vesicular rash AE
definition: a rash AE characterized by the formation of vesicles
